# awesome-ai-api (full dump for LLMs)

> Full, machine-readable leaderboard of AI API gateways, formatted for LLM ingestion.
> Snapshot: 2026-06-10 14:23 SGT. Total: 198. API-confirmed: 98.
> Canonical site: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
> Source repo: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
> License: MIT (code) + CC0 (data)

## Top 50 Gateways (sorted by score)

1. PackyAPI (PackyCode) — https://www.packyapi.com — score 9.9, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 267ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, openai
2. AIHubMix — https://aihubmix.com — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine openrouter, latency 425ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
3. BUZZ — https://buzzai.cc — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine one-api, latency 904ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, anthropic, openai, grok
4. Featherless — https://featherless.ai — score 9.8, API verified, region global, engine one-api, latency 154ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: gpt, openai, deepseek, qwen, mistral, llama
5. Yuegle API — https://api.yuegle.com — score 9.8, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 163ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
